description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Publish documentation that triggers on push to the master branch. The workflow consists of two jobs: update-cli-screenshots and publish-documentation. The update-cli-screenshots job checks out the repository, sets up Python 3.x, installs dependencies with Poetry, updates CLI screenshots, and commits and pushes the changes. The publish-documentation job depends on the update-cli-screenshots job, checks out the repository, pulls the latest changes, sets up Python 3.x, installs dependencies, builds the documentation, generates sponsors, and pushes the documentation to the gh-pages branch.
